lenses.notes: Super 35 ultra-wide cine zoom, PL/EF/E/MFT mount. Source: tokinacinemausa.com.
Super 35 standard cine zoom, PL/EF/E mount. Source: tokinacinemausa.com.
Super 35 telephoto cine zoom, PL/EF/E mount. MkII revision. Source: tokinacinemausa.com.
Full Frame / VistaVision wide cine zoom, PL mount. Source: tokinacinemausa.com.

Tokina Vista-C prime, full frame / VistaVision (46.7mm image circle), PL mount. New optical formula versus Vista and Vista-P; red/blue flare character, increased spherical aberration, reduced contrast, nearly zero focus breathing. T1.5. Source: tokinacinemausa.com.

Tokina Vista-P prime, full frame / VistaVision (46.7mm image circle), PL mount. Modified Vista optical design with increased spherical aberration and reduced contrast for a vintage Petzval-type rendering. Distinct product line from the Cinema Vista primes. Source: tokinacinemausa.com.
